Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Feb-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PGN-08-291523 Guardianship of Christopher Gomez Shimabuku.

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Christopher Shimabuku. Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Grant Tomioka for Dennis Shimabuku.

The matters was continued to February 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of close of the Estate. Status of the First and Final Account and Report in the Guardianship matter was set for February 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 206.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
